local.name: LMStudio
local.notes: On-premises LMStudio instance. All data classifications allowed — data stays on-premises.

mid.name: LiteLLM
mid.notes: Private LiteLLM proxy on internal network. Confidential and below allowed.

premium.name: GitHubCopilot
premium.notes: External GitHub Copilot API. Internal and below only — no Confidential/Restricted/Secret data to external providers.

_description: LLM provider tier reference config. max_classification defines highest data classification allowed. requires_role is advisory metadata for operators — current llm_gating.rego enforces classification/PII via hardcoded provider sets, not this file.
